cups.image_prompt_seed: a happy couple with arms raised toward a rainbow of ten golden cups in the sky, two children dancing beside them, a cozy cottage by a river, blooming spring garden, pure joy

cups.upright_meaning: 帶著好奇心感受世界，新的情感或創意靈感出現。
cups.reversed_meaning: 過度敏感或沉溺在不切實際的幻想中。

cups.upright_meaning: 帶著浪漫與理想而來的使者，可能代表邀約或告白。
cups.reversed_meaning: 美麗的承諾背後可能是空洞的，或過於理想化。

cups.image_prompt_seed: an elegant knight riding a white horse slowly forward, holding out a golden cup as an offering, winged helmet, a gentle river winding through a spring meadow with flowers

cups.upright_meaning: 深邃的情感智慧與無條件的溫柔關懷。
cups.reversed_meaning: 過度投入他人的情緒而忽略自身需求。

cups.image_prompt_seed: a compassionate queen seated on a throne by the water, gazing at an ornate closed chalice she holds, cherub decorations on the throne, pebbled shore, calm spring sea

cups.upright_meaning: 在情感與理性之間取得完美平衡的智者。
cups.reversed_meaning: 壓抑情感或在平靜外表下隱藏風暴。
cups.symbolism: 國王坐在海上浮動的寶座，手持聖杯與權杖，一邊有魚一邊有船
cups.image_prompt_seed: a wise king seated on a throne floating on turbulent water yet remaining calm, holding a cup and scepter, a fish leaping and a ship sailing, spring sky clearing after rain

swords.upright_meaning: 思維的突破，真相的力量帶來清晰的方向。
swords.reversed_meaning: 思緒混亂或真相被扭曲，溝通出現問題。

swords.reversed_meaning: 終於做出決定或被迫面對一直逃避的問題。
